description_long: This is a modern commercial airplane with a streamlined fuselage painted primarily in white and red, featuring a blue-tinted cockpit windshield at the front. The aircraft has two large turbofan engines mounted under its low-set, swept-back wings, which are equipped with upward-angled winglets at the tips. The fuselage is lined with a series of circular passenger windows along both sides, indicating a multi-seat cabin configuration. The tail section features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, all in red with white accents. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retractable and currently stowed. The overall design is typical of a short- to medium-haul passenger jet, suitable for urban airports.
description: A sleek, white and red commercial airplane with underwing turbofan engines, swept low wings with winglets, and a conventional tail. The fuselage features multiple passenger windows and a blue cockpit windshield.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, blue cockpit windshield, and both underwing engines with the swept wings and winglets clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the row of passenger windows, the full length of the fuselage, and the low-mounted swept wing with visible engine and winglet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section with a single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the trailing edges of the wings and engines.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the passenger windows, wing, engine, and winglet from the opposite side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a blue-tinted windshield and multi-seat configuration.
